title: Bongy!
description: Resourcepack that replaces chicken with Headchicken a.k.a Bongy from Limbus comapny
body:
### **REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR [EMF] AND [ETF] (if fabric)**


a funny resourcepack that replaces **chicken** with **Bongy** from Limbus comapny

 

And unlike Limbus, they are not dangerous here, they run freely through the fields making funny noises

They can be kept as pets or even create an army.


Bawkbawbawbawk Babawbawk! Kghg!
